title: artocarpus neocaledonica
intro: Artocarpus neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonian breadfruit, is a species of plant in the mulberry family (Moraceae) native to New Caledonia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Artocarpus neocaledonica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant support. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also eaten as a fruit, providing essential nutrients and minerals.
